full_text:
Liao Li (Gongyuan) 廖立 (公淵)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Liao Li (廖立), styledGongyuan (公淵), was born in Wuling. Arrogant officer who neglected his duties, was demoted by Zhuge Liang. Liao Li was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom. Liao Li lived during the Later Han Dynasty and Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
